task: Create a regular expression to validate an AWS S3 bucket name (lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, 3-63 characters long)
solution_criteria: Matches valid S3 bucket naming conventions, prevents special characters, enforces length constraints

task: Write a Python function to convert an AWS resource ARN into its component parts (service, region, account ID, etc.)
solution_criteria: Correctly parses different ARN formats, returns a dictionary with standard ARN components

task: Create a JSON configuration for an AWS Lambda function's basic CloudFormation resource definition
solution_criteria: Includes required properties like runtime, handler, code location, and basic execution role
